creator: dillon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I believe this bug is the same as kern/7418 and should now be fixed.  The 
bug was related to DELWRI being set in a bp with RELBUF.  We can reopen 
the PR if you are still seeing the problem.  There were actually two 
serious bugs fixed in this general area.
